query:
SELECT 
  g.id,
  g.code,
  g.name,
  g.type,
  g.student_count,
  g.teacher_count,
  g.total_count,
  g.start_city,
  g.batch_code,
  g.flight_info,
  g.school_list,
  g.start_date,
  g.end_date
FROM `groups` g
ORDER BY g.batch_code, g.code
LIMIT 20;
